diagrams.title: Hamming Code (7,4) Structure
diagrams.description: Shows how 7-bit Hamming codeword is organized with parity bits at positions 1,2,4 and data bits at positions 3,5,6,7
diagrams.purpose: Understanding Hamming code organization and error correction mechanism

diagrams.title: 2D Parity Check Matrix
diagrams.description: A 4x4 data matrix with row parity bits on right and column parity bits at bottom, showing how single-bit error is located
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how 2D parity detects and corrects single-bit errors

diagrams.title: Block Coding Process
diagrams.description: Shows encoder taking k-bit message, adding r parity bits to produce n-bit codeword, transmission, and decoder
diagrams.purpose: Understanding complete block coding and decoding flow

diagrams.title: Codeword Space Visualization
diagrams.description: Demonstrates minimum distance concept with circles representing codewords and their minimum separation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding minimum distance and error correction capability
